context: You are checking into a hotel in Amman. The receptionist greets you at the front desk.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: أهلاً وسهلاً! مرحباً بك في فندقنا.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say hello and that you have a reservation

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Please! Under what name is the reservation?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask how much the room costs per night

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: الغرفة المفردة بخمسين ديناراً في الليلة. الفطور مشمول.
exchanges.translation: A single room is fifty dinars per night. Breakfast is included.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: نعم، الواي فاي مجاني في كل الفندق. تفضل المفتاح. غرفتك رقم ثلاثمئة وخمسة.
exchanges.translation: Yes, Wi-Fi is free throughout the hotel. Here is the key. Your room is number three hundred five.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: المغادرة قبل الساعة الثانية عشرة ظهراً. أتمنى لك إقامة سعيدة!
exchanges.translation: Check-out is before twelve noon. I wish you a pleasant stay!
